case_title: OVANDO CECILIA VS MARTINEZ LIDYA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT TO FILE A CROSS COMPLAINT. DEFT CLAIMS PLAINTIFF DAMAGED UNIT AFTER EVICTION.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ LIDYA MARTINEZ AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT OVANDO CECILIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
